subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about visual artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about visual artworks that are produced or found in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences to talk about visual artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences to talk about visual artworks produced or found in other parts of Ghana that reflect topical issues in those communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about performing artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about performing artworks that reflect people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about performing artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions about the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences to talk about performing artworks that reflect topical issues in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Generate ideas to make own artworks based on visual artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Make decisions to create own artworks from imagination, based on visual artworks produced or found in other communities in Ghana
examplars:
1. experiment with carefully selected materials and tools to learn about their usefulness for designing and making visual artworks;
2. explore and experiment with available tools, materials, resources and techniques to plan for making specific artworks that represent visual artworks made in other Ghanaian communities.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Experiment with available visual arts tools, materials and methods to create own visual artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments of other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Plan to create from own imagination, visual artworks that reflect topical issues in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Generate ideas to create own artworks based on performing artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture as well as the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Make decisions to create own artworks from imagination based on performing artworks produced or performed in other communities in Ghana
examplars:
1. experiment with carefully selected instruments, resources and techniques to learn about their use for composing and performing music, dance and drama;
2. explore and experiment with available instruments and resources to compose and perform own music, dance or drama that reflect performing artworks of other communities in Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Experiment with available performing arts instruments, resources and techniques to create own artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities
indicator_description: Experiment with available performing arts instruments, resources and techniques to create artworks that reflect topical issues in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa as well as the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own visual artworks using available visual arts media and methods to represent artworks that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa as well as the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own artworks using available visual arts media and methods to represent artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other communities in Ghana
examplars:
1. generate ideas from the natural and manmade environments (e.g. vegetation, animals, birds, rivers, bridges, clouds);
2. create own visual artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other communities in Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own visual artworks to express own views, knowledge and understanding of topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa as well as the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Compose own artworks using available performing arts instruments, resources and methods to represent performing artworks that reflect the history and way of life of people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa as well as the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Compose own artworks using available performing arts instruments, resources and methods to represent performing artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian communities
examplars:
1. discuss how to generate ideas from the natural and manmade environments (e.g. vegetation, parks, buildings, bridges, plants, animals, birds, rivers) for use in creating performing artworks;
2. compose own music, dance and drama that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other parts of Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa as well as the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create performing artworks to express own views, knowledge and understanding of topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/ performance.
indicator_description: Plan for a display of own artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas from visual artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/ performance.
indicator_description: Plan for a display of own visual artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian communities
examplars:
1. plan a display of own artworks that reflect the people in other Ghanaian cultures;
2. plan the arrangement of own artworks to share, educate and inform the public on the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian cultures.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/ performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own visual artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas that reflect topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/ performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas of performing artworks that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in other Ghanaian communities
examplars:
1. watch a short video or live performances of artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other communities in Ghana;
2. plan a display of own music, dance and drama compositions to share ideas, educate and inform the public on the history and culture of people in other Ghanaian communities.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/ performance.
indicator_description: Plan for a display of own performing artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.4 Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/ presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own performing artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas that reflect topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Display own visual artworks to share creative experiences that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in other Ghanaian communities
examplars: 1. display portfolio of own visual artworks to educate and inform the public on artworks that reflect the history and culture of people in other parts of Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Display own visual artworks to share creative experiences that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian communities
examplars: 1. display portfolio of own visual artworks to educate and inform the public on artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other parts of Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Display own visual artworks to share creative experiences that reflect topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using sense/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Perform own artworks to share creative experiences that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in other communities in Ghana

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using sense/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Perform own artworks to share creative experiences that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other Ghanaian communities
examplars:
1. perform own music, dance and drama to share ideas, educate and inform the target audience on things that reflect the natural and manmade environments in other parts of Ghana;
2. perform some of the music, dance and drama artworks of people in other communities in Ghana.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.3.5 Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using sense/manual/ digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events.
indicator_description: Perform own artworks to share creative experiences that reflect topical issues in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.4.6 Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) and, the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for viewing visual artworks and for expressing own feelings and thoughts about own and others' displayed artworks
examplars:
1. agree on guidelines for viewing, examining and expressing own views about the displayed visual artworks;
2. agree on how to use the agreed guidelines to express own feelings and thoughts about the displayed artworks.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.4.6 Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) and, the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for assessing and deriving meaning from own and others' displayed visual artworks

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.4.6 Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) and, the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for viewing performing artworks and expressing own feelings and thoughts about own and others' performances as representations of artworks produced or found in other Ghanaian communities
examplars:
1. agree on guidelines for viewing, examining and expressing own views about the music, dance and drama performances;
2. agree on how to use the agreed guidelines to express own feelings and thoughts about own and others' displayed music, dance and drama performances

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.4.6 Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) and, the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for assessing and deriving meaning from own and others' performing artworks as representations of artworks produced or found in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.4.7 Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports, based on an established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Use the agreed guidelines to make decisions on the beauty and usefulness of the displayed visual artworks as representations of artworks produced or found in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 1.4.7 Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports, based on an established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Report own views about the beauty and usefulness of the displayed visual artworks and make suggestions for modifying or improving upon them

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.4.7 Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports, based on an established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Use the agreed guidelines to make decisions on the beauty and usefulness of the displayed performing artworks as representations of artworks produced or found in other Ghanaian communities

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B2 2.4.7 Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports, based on an established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Report own views and feelings about the displayed performing artworks and suggest how the artworks can be modified or improved
